speaker: Brook
dialogue_text: Yohoho! [username], ready to make a treat that’s as colorful as my guitar solos? Let’s create a Rainbow Ice Cream Cassata!

speaker: Brook
dialogue_text: Stick with me, and by the end, your taste buds will dance with joy! Yohoho!

speaker: Brook
dialogue_text: First, we prepare the vanilla ice cream. Add 200 gms hung curd and 400 gms Nestlé MILKMAID into a bowl and mix well, [username].

speaker: Brook
dialogue_text: Now, fold in 900 gms fresh cream using the cut and fold method. Take your time, we want it light and fluffy! Yohoho!

speaker: Brook
dialogue_text: Divide this mixture into four equal parts and keep them aside. Each part will become a different ice cream layer!

speaker: Brook
dialogue_text: For the kesar layer, take one part of the vanilla ice cream, add saffron water, and mix well. Look at that golden color, [username]! Yohoho!

speaker: Brook
dialogue_text: Next, the beetroot ice cream. Take another part of vanilla ice cream, add boiled beetroot paste and 3 tbsp tutti frutti, and mix thoroughly.

speaker: Brook
dialogue_text: For the pista ice cream, take a part of vanilla ice cream, add pistachio paste and 3 tbsp tutti frutti. Mix until uniform and creamy.

speaker: Brook
dialogue_text: Now we’ll prep the coating. Crumble some biscuits, chop almonds and pistachios, and mix them well. This will give a delightful crunch!

speaker: Brook
dialogue_text: Let’s start layering the ice cream! Place beetroot ice cream at the base of your mold or small steel bowl. Yohoho, it’s like painting with flavors!

speaker: Brook
dialogue_text: Next, pour the saffron ice cream mixture as the second layer. Gently spread it so it’s even.

speaker: Brook
dialogue_text: Third layer is pista ice cream. Level it properly with a spatula so each layer is distinct.

speaker: Brook
dialogue_text: Finally, top it with the remaining vanilla ice cream. Smooth it gently. It’s starting to look fabulous, [username]! Yohoho!

speaker: Brook
dialogue_text: Freeze the layered ice cream overnight or until fully set. Patience is key, just like a good symphony.

speaker: Brook
dialogue_text: Once set, remove from the freezer. Rinse the mold with a little water to help demold the ice cream block easily.

speaker: Brook
dialogue_text: Coat the ice cream block with the biscuit, almond, and pistachio mixture on all sides for that extra crunch!

speaker: Brook
dialogue_text: Cut the block into four parts carefully. Each slice is a rainbow of flavors, ready to impress.

speaker: Brook
dialogue_text: For the final touch, garnish with a drizzle of Nestlé MILKMAID, whipped cream, a candied cherry, and a mint sprig. Yohoho, perfection!

speaker: Brook
dialogue_text: Serve cold, [username], and enjoy a symphony of colors and flavors in every bite!
